{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323045935EB2C16B2D75DCE289213"}"},"total":1230},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7376814016641696537","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"星际和战宠完全在我最喜欢的点上，喜欢这类题材的可以看看，写的非常好有完整的故事线，平常偏日常，很生动有趣，但后续应该有战斗大场面~希望好的新书能被更多人看到~（好怕作者弃坑呜呜，好几本都断更了）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1717551142,"group_id":"7365176379014384665","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/igyBORrpN/68GHDxBqrV78KGTyCKLbR3JxWQrdBXzX","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1253904295406781","user_name":"握住一只喵爪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1253904295406781","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7365176379014384665","book_info":{"abstract":"【星际+女强+无cp+群像+萌宠+猛兽】
秦九从小喜欢听各种战兽的故事，励志要成为一名御兽师。
好不容易成功报考御兽师们心中top1的学校并成功上岸，她以为自己快可以圆梦了！
可看见御兽专业学费后面的零，她沉默了。
翻开招生简章，她终于看见一个自己勉强能负担的专业——宠物护理
她想：曲线救国，走迂回路线也不是不行？
于是，她成为星皇学院开办以来第一个选冷门专业的状元。
*
秦九勤勤恳恳，决定将宠物护理发扬光大。
战兽嘛，不也是宠物的一种？
于是她做出震惊整个御兽界的壮举：
给怕水的战兽洗澡；
把头伸进战兽的嘴巴里喂药；
为战兽的屁屁剪爱心毛毛；
甚至还要抓战兽去嘎蛋！！！
众人：我怕不是在做梦？这个世界终于疯成了我不认识的模样！
不仅学校的老师过来取经，就连星际上各个御兽名校都希望能邀请她到自己的学校分享经验。
御兽军、战兽培育中心、慕名前来的御兽交流生涌入星皇，只为求一个御兽秘诀。
在给战兽做精油spa的秦九：？
秦九：你们是不是找错人了？我只是一个宠物护理专业的学生？
*
（微爽文，偶尔轻松无厘头，群像可能有点慢热）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/cf4e72567fb7b27d43be211d7ac3b636","author":"冰糖橙冻","author_id":"","book_id":"7365176379014384665","book_name":"你的战兽？我的！宠物护理能御兽","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8e8c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7678人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":77,"name":"星际","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=77&name=星际&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7365371844901208601","read_count":"7678","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1238886"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"544","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,幻想言情,星际,女强,无CP,搞笑轻松,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/61224fe2802a57e533f4a2c792f642a3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779397175&x-signature=kn2LQ86fXhLa36xEd31IrESYMDI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"796460344410536","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"65"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323045935EB2C16B2D75DCE289213"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":41,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":9094,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10169,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":51143},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7448265050641187646","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"追平了 开心ヽ(○^㉨^)ﾉ♪
（呜呜呜呜连载的痛开始了）[偷笑][飞吻][害羞]
秦九你是最棒的，加油加油 不得不说太学霸的
（大大也厉害 加油大大）
 秦九：简单的嘞[偷笑]
其它：阿阿 阿？（八百米大刀.ing）
总体推荐入，埋线比较长，开始的高光点在反差和毛绒绒环节，因为毛绒绒（划线）设定入坑d(ŐдŐ๑)，兽与兽之间都好有爱，大大的设定也有爱，互相关照！
有些觉得奇怪的点都在后面有答案。
ps：希望后续战兽们的待遇能更好，有更大的地方可以去玩耍 玩乐，在一起结束之后都要好好的！

好文千千万，设定都不一样，喜欢就咱就看 ，不喜欢左滑退出即可。建议喜欢的不要看评论区，真的很影响心情[撇嘴] 莫名其妙
迷雾慢慢散开，预知后事，敬请期待——
大大更新！（疯狂暗示.ing）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734364628,"group_id":"7365176379014384665","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我亦苍生一浮游","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3YuFtIIQGYBbfk0nfrR+lSJUocnB076bHu38RV9cOZC","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d2bea92b1e5f45e8b01fddbce365145f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787608&x-signature=gvADJDk05qjIHXmzLPB6sc74jec%3D","user_id":"4028213663370660","user_name":"顺风而起"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4028213663370660","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7365176379014384665","book_info":{"abstract":"【星际+女强+无cp+群像+萌宠+猛兽】


写得很细腻，感觉特别适合拍成漫画或动漫
设定也算比较新颖
但是讲实在的，番外多出点讲点怎么解决的他们后面的慢生活啊就好了
没看到后面的时候脑子不知道为什么就觉得就好适合动漫呀
可能我比较急性子吧，感觉如果动漫的话我会二倍速快速观看。
小说的话就有点想跳章了，想找到我特别想看的那几个点"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1746463047,"group_id":"7365176379014384665","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"沉迷小说无无可自拔的一位","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7MUpzi1OCAHu9Mg3QG9Ubo=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/976ccbf6b0a943ba8636f1c6d8bdc7f5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792860&x-signature=LTV8zD8G6H1H0%2BjvBuBYn6j%2F8xw%3D","user_id":"79256711727","user_name":"小墨雯"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"79256711727","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1680780701,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7365176379014384665","book_info":{"abstract":"【星际+女强+无cp+群像+萌宠+猛兽】
